field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: The mobile phase at critical conditions consisted of a mixture of water/acetonitrile (54 vol%:46 vol%)
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: All LACCC columns were thermostated at 30°C

conditions.notes: Used for the first dimension of 2D-HPLC for polyethers. Text also mentions a critical point of 43 vol% acetonitrile / 57 vol% water in the Results section for EO, but the Experimental section specifies 54/46 for the analysis setup.
